prose.en: Ensure that non-escorted personnel performing maintenance activities not directly associated with the system but in the physical proximity of the system, have required access authorizations.

guidance.en: Personnel who perform maintenance activities in other capacities not directly related to the system include physical plant personnel and custodial personnel.

prose.en: non-escorted personnel performing maintenance activities not directly associated with the system but in the physical proximity of the system have required access authorizations.

objects.en: physical and environmental protection policy and procedures
Organizational personnel with system maintenance responsibilities
organizational personnel with personnel security responsibilities
organizational personnel with physical access control responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
